title: Import Members
description: Upload a CSV or Excel file to import members into this organisation.

upload.title: Upload File
upload.drag_hint: Drop file here or click to select
upload.formats_hint: CSV, XLSX or XLS — up to 50,000 rows

processing.title: Processing Import…
processing.background_hint: Processing in background — you can close this tab and come back later.

error.label: Error:
error.invalid_format: Invalid file format. Please upload a CSV or Excel file.

info_panel.title: File Format
info_panel.scale_text: Supports up to 50,000 members per import. Large files are processed in the background.
